title: Replace With Today’s Work
subtitle: Use one public-domain or otherwise reusable work at a time.
rights: Public domain / CC0 / verified reusable status
look_prompt: What shapes or repeated lines hold the picture together?
make_prompt: Redraw one section in line only, then turn it into a coloring page or a study prompt.

image.alt: Sample placeholder artwork. Replace this with the current art of the day image and alt text.
